title: hypericum delphicum
intro: Hypericum delphicum, also known as Tassy or Tansy, is a flowering plant species within the Hypericum genus. It is native to the Americas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is known for its health benefits, which include reducing stress, improving mood, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Hypericum delphicum include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
